plugins.name: Tamagotchi
plugins.description: An animated desktop pet for the side dock: it idles, blinks, hops, and naps, perks up when you switch panes, bounces when the bell rings, and you can click it to pet and feed it. A Tier-2 graphics demo.

plugins.name: Session Relay
plugins.description: A demo of the inter-plugin message bus: subscribes to the 'chat' topic and logs what other plugins publish.
